features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You cast cleric spells using Wisdom, preparing them from the cleric spell list; you know cleric cantrips.

features.name: Divine Order
features.description: Choose the sacred role that shapes your calling.

featureChoices.name: Divine Order
featureChoices.description: Choose your role as a cleric.

options.name: Protector
options.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

options.name: Thaumaturge
options.description: Learn an extra cleric cantrip, and add your Wisdom modifier to Arcana and Religion checks.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description: When you restore hit points with a level-1+ spell, the target regains extra hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.
